name: IndusInd EazyDiner Platinum Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X EazyPoints on all transactions via EazyDiner platform
3X EazyPoints on dining spends at any restaurant
1 EazyPoint per ₹100 spent on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: Complimentary EazyDiner Prime membership with up to 50% off at premium restaurants
Priority reservations at top restaurants via EazyDiner
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹250 per month
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
pros: Excellent 10X rewards on EazyDiner bookings for food enthusiasts
3X rewards on all dining spends beyond EazyDiner
Good milestone benefits tied to dining experiences
cons: Rewards are heavily skewed towards dining, limited value for non-diners
High annual fee of ₹2,499 for a mid-tier card
idealFor: Food enthusiasts who frequently dine out at premium restaurants
Regular EazyDiner users who can maximize the 10X rewards
Users who value curated dining experiences and restaurant discounts

faqs.question: What is EazyDiner Prime membership and how does it work?
faqs.answer: EazyDiner Prime is a premium dining membership that offers up to 50% off at 5,000+ premium restaurants across India. As an IndusInd EazyDiner cardholder, you get this membership complimentary on paying the joining fee.

faqs.question: How do EazyPoints work?
faqs.answer: EazyPoints are earned on every purchase. You earn 10X on EazyDiner transactions, 3X on dining, and 1 point per ₹100 on other spends. Points can be redeemed for dining vouchers, statement credit, or gift vouchers.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,499 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: Can I use dining benefits outside India?
faqs.answer: The EazyDiner Prime membership and dining discounts are primarily for restaurants in India listed on the EazyDiner platform. For international dining, you earn the base reward rate.
